criteria.label: Bénéfices > features
criteria.rationale: Outcome hits dans H1/subtitle/headings=0 vs features=0. Ratio outcome/(outcome+feature)=0.00. Top>=0.55+out>=3, OK>=0.30, critical<0.30.

criteria.label: Objections levées
criteria.rationale: Top: ≥4 objections distinctes + FAQ ≥5 Q. OK: ≥2 objections ou FAQ ≥4 Q. Weak: ≥1. Critical: 0.

criteria.label: Preuves concrètes
criteria.rationale: Top: ≥4 types de preuves + (3+ % OU étude). OK: ≥2 types. Weak: 1 type. Critical: 0.

criteria.label: Témoignages nommés + photo/vidéo
criteria.rationale: Top: (vidéo OU widget vérifié) + ≥2 nommés + photo. OK: ≥2 nommés OU widget. Weak: ≥1 témoignage. Critical: 0.

sample_questions: our website. Discover Common questions How many translated words do I need?
ounted once and not each time it's translated. You can watch our video to learn more about how translated word count is calculated. What if I go over my limit?
ou upgrade your plan or delete the extra translations to stay within your plan’s translated word count. Do I pay full price when I upgrade my plan?
ou already paid for your current plan, you will only pay the difference for the upgraded plan, and only for the remainder of your billing period. What support do you provide?
our website to Weglot Translation API in one month. This is approximately equal to the number of monthly translated page views on your website. Can I use Weglot on more than one website?
ou have at least a Pro plan you have the multisite feature. It allows you to manage several websites separately and gives access to one person per website. What happens after my 14-day free trial?

criteria.label: FAQ ciblée objections
criteria.rationale: Top: ≥5 Q + ≥5 business + ≥3 catégories. OK: ≥4 Q + ≥3 business. Weak: ≥2 Q. Critical: <2 Q.

criteria.label: Ton cohérent
criteria.rationale: Top: adresse stable + ≥3 punchlines. OK: adresse stable volume ≥20. Weak: mix ou faible volume.

criteria.label: Absence de jargon creux
criteria.rationale: Top: 0 hit. OK: 1-4 hits. Weak: 5-7 hits. Critical: ≥8 hits → cap 20/24.
